fields.name: Mixing + Mastering
fields.description:
Get professional mixing and mastering from the comfort of your own space. Our expert engineers will work remotely to bring your tracks to life, ensuring top-quality sound and industry-ready results.  

Send us your stems, and we’ll handle the rest—delivering polished, radio-ready tracks without the need to be in the studio.
fields.price_desc:
Mixing - $100 per song  
Mastering - $100 per song Bundle  
(Mixing & Mastering) - $150 per song

fields.name: Production
fields.description:
Looking for a unique, high-quality beat? Let us craft one for you from scratch. We’ll work closely with you to capture your vision, creating a fully mixed and mastered beat that’s ready for you to use.  

Your sound, your style—brought to life with professional production.
fields.sub_description: Additionally, explore our Traktrain page for pre-made beats.

fields.name: Graphic Design
fields.description:
Bring your vision to life with custom graphic design for any of your music-related needs. From eye-catching album cover art and promotional flyers to unique artist logos, we provide creative designs that capture your style and message.  

Let’s create something memorable for your brand!
fields.price_desc: Pricing starts at $50, with rates varying based on the complexity and scope of each project.

fields.name: Photography
fields.description: Elevate your image with professional photography. From promotional photos and album artwork to behind-the-scenes shots and event coverage, we specialize in creating visuals that showcase your unique style and personality.

fields.name: DAWs
fields.description: FL Studios + Pro Tools + Garage Band

fields.artist_bio: DYN is a songwriter, rapper, singer, producer, photographer, he began making music in high school, forming numerous connections in the local music scene. With a decade of production experience under his belt, he’s set out to transform the underground music scene in the greater Pittsburgh area.

CHUCK! is a songwriter, rapper, singer, producer, and audio engineer. Coming to NOTA studios with years of prior studio experience, he has an ear for hits and a passion for his craft that sets him apart from the rest.

ABSNT is a multimedia artist, graphic designer, songwriter, rapper, producer, and audio engineer. Between creating albums of his own from top to bottom in his home studio, to engineering projects for a number of talented artists, he’s developed a reputation as an artist of many trades and a passionate collaborator.
